name: FlowLens MCP Server
what_it_does: Official FlowLens MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with FlowLens — a product analytics platform focused on user flow and funnel analysis — querying user journey data, analyzing conversion funnels, identifying drop-off points, accessing cohort and retention metrics, and integrating product analytics insights into agent-driven growth and product optimization workflows.
use_cases: Analyzing user conversion funnels and drop-off points from product analytics agents
Querying user journey flows for UX improvement from product management agents
Generating funnel analysis reports for growth teams from reporting agents
Identifying where users abandon workflows from conversion optimization agents
Building cohort analysis for retention insights from customer success agents
Automating product analytics digests from regular reporting agents
not_for: Teams not using FlowLens (use Mixpanel, Amplitude, or Heap MCPs)
Infrastructure monitoring (FlowLens is for product analytics, not system metrics)
Real-time event streaming (FlowLens processes aggregated analytics)
best_when: A product team using FlowLens needs AI-driven analysis of user flows and conversion funnels — for data-driven product decisions and growth optimization.
avoid_when: You don't use FlowLens — use Mixpanel, Amplitude, or other product analytics MCP servers instead.

auth.notes: FlowLens API key required. Generate from FlowLens dashboard. Store as environment variable.

pricing.free_tier_limits: FlowLens free tier with limited events and seats
pricing.paid_tiers: FlowLens paid plans for higher event volumes
pricing.notes: FlowLens has a free tier for small teams. MCP server is free. Paid plans for scale.

performance.rate_limits: FlowLens API: reasonable limits for analytical queries

known_agent_gotchas: FlowLens is a newer platform — data volume and feature set may be limited vs established tools
Funnel definitions must exist in FlowLens before querying — funnels aren't created via MCP
Analytics data may have processing delay — real-time event data not immediately available
Official MCP but FlowLens is a smaller vendor — long-term support uncertain
GDPR implications for European user analytics data — review data processing agreements
Limited community resources compared to Mixpanel/Amplitude — fewer examples and tutorials
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. GDPR compliant (EU data residency). User analytics data may be sensitive. Store API key as environment variable. Official FlowLens MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. GDPR. User analytics sensitivity. Store key as env var. Official MCP.
